findings: Protocol states readers must tolerate absent/malformed files but no reader code implements this
JSON parse fallback inconsistent: some use || echo fallbacks but Python exceptions crash silently
Missing file tolerance partial: some existence checks before reads, others have none
Atomic write pattern correct: .tmp-* prefix + atomic rename/replace protects partial writes
JSONL ledger appends unvalidated: no line-by-line json.loads validation
No truncation detection: no checksums, length headers, or trailing markers
Race mitigation via mv for claiming but orphan recovery has TOCTOU window
try/except swallows all errors without logging - hides corruption
Monitor does not validate swarm-state JSON - can crash on malformed data
No ledger recovery: single malformed JSONL line breaks commander telemetry parsing
